name: Pool of water
description: I'm in a Pool of water
hints: You're in the pool of water! There's a large key here.
GET KEY - the large key is needed to unlock a door at the pyramid.
SWI to swim, DRI WAT to drink (safe water here, unlike the acid pool inside).
GET KEY. CLE COA if you have coal to clean it. E=back to desert pool area (3).
notes: Pool of water (safe). Large key is here - needed for pyramid doors. Can fill canteen here. E=desert pool area (3).
